description: QiOS Tools Manifest - Core tools for GINA and system operations

core_tools.name: Add Front Matter
core_tools.description: Intelligently adds/merges QiOS-compliant front matter to markdown files without overwriting existing metadata

core_tools.name: Generate Indexes
core_tools.description: Creates index files for every folder in the knowledge base, listing all subfolders and files. Generates a master index at the root.

core_tools.name: Organize Vault Structure
core_tools.description: Mirrors kb/ folder structure in docs/, data/, and assets/. Moves files to proper locations and creates reference files in kb/ that link to related materials.

deduplication_tools.name: Find Duplicates
deduplication_tools.description: Finds duplicate files by filename and/or content hash. Generates a markdown report for review.

deduplication_tools.name: QiOS Deduplication Tool
deduplication_tools.description: Advanced interactive deduplication tool with staged processing. Function-based design for GINA integration.
deduplication_tools.note: Designed with function-based architecture for programmatic use

structure_tools.name: Tree Compiler
structure_tools.description: Generates canonical QiOS folder tree from registries. Creates root folders, realm subtrees, and README placeholders.

dev_error_memory.name: Sync Errors to Markdown
dev_error_memory.description: Syncs dev errors from Supabase to DEV_ERRORS.md files in repo directories for Cursor context

dev_error_memory.name: Log Error to Supabase
dev_error_memory.description: Logs a development error to Supabase dev_error_log table
dev_error_memory.usage: python tools/python/log_error_to_supabase.py --file-path PATH --error-type TYPE --error-message MESSAGE [--tags TAGS]

dev_error_memory.name: Get File Error Context
dev_error_memory.description: Retrieves error history and context for a specific file

dev_error_memory.name: Mark Error Resolved
dev_error_memory.description: Marks a dev error as resolved in Supabase

queue_management.name: Queue Loader
queue_management.description: Reads fs_scan_events.jsonl and inserts/updates ingestion_queue in Supabase. Handles deduplication by file_path.

queue_management.name: File System Scanner
queue_management.description: Scans file system and generates fs_scan_events.jsonl for queue loading

governance_tools.name: QiOS Linter
governance_tools.description: Enforces QiOS governance rules: naming, front matter, realms, structure. Core governance enforcement tool.

governance_tools.name: Linter Runner
governance_tools.description: Runs linter across multiple directories or the entire system

data_tools.name: CSV to Markdown Converter
data_tools.description: Converts CSV files to markdown with front matter mapping. Obsidian-friendly output.

local_file_ops.name: Unzip Goblin
local_file_ops.description: Local file operations tool for unzipping and processing archives

utility_tools.name: Check Markdown
utility_tools.description: Validates markdown files for front matter compliance and structure

utility_tools.name: Fix Spaces
utility_tools.description: Fixes spacing issues in file names and content

notes.gina_compatibility: Tools marked with gina_compatible: true have proper CLI interfaces, error handling, and can be invoked programmatically by GINA
notes.removed_tools: Many duplicate and one-off tools have been moved to .trash/ directory. See consolidation log for details.
notes.future_enhancements: Remaining tools should be reviewed for GINA compatibility improvements: adding argparse, error handling, and function-based design where needed
